topic: ROP stock direction Feb 18 to Feb 24
summary: ROP in severe downtrend after Jan 27 earnings miss; multiple Monte Carlo approaches estimate 15-28% probability of 4-day gain
content: ROP dropped ~27% in 6 weeks after disappointing Q4 earnings (Jan 27). Multiple analyst downgrades. Stock at 52-week low (~316 vs high of 595). Insider bought at $358 on Feb 6. Monte Carlo estimates: all-data bootstrap 22%, parametric 22%, ex-crash-day 28%, last-10-days 14.5%. Mean daily return is significantly negative (t-test p=0.047). Strong quantitative evidence for continued decline.
